The '''Battle of Distna''' was a battle in the [[Hegemony theater|campaign]] against [[Delak Krennel]]'s [[Ciutric Hegemony]]. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], along with a [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter|snoopscoot]], were scouting the moon [[Distna]], believing it to be where the [[Pulsar Station]] was being made. They ran into a large ambush established by [[Ysanne Isard (clone)|Ysanne Isard's clone]], and were only rescued by a [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] force of the [[Xucphra Corporation]] sent by the real [[Ysanne Isard]]. The Rogues were believed dead by the outside [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], and used this to infiltrate the Hegemony undercover.

In the battle, [[Lyyr Zatoq]] and [[Khe-Jeen Slee]] were killed, [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] and [[Asyr Sei'lar]] were severely wounded, and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn's]] X-wing was damaged.
